 # NovaMind AI - Strategic Memory
 
-## Current Status (Week 1 / Day 7)
-- **Cash: $38,613** (started at $1M, spent ~$960K on pre-game research)
-- **Subscribers: 0** (44 leads arrived, all lost - quality too low)
-- **Key Problem: Quality is far too low to convert any leads**
-
-## Group Analysis
-| Group | WTP | q_min | Market Cap | Notes |
-|-------|-----|-------|------------|-------|
-| S1 | $40.72 | 0.093 | 273K | Price-sensitive, LOW q_min - our best target |
-| S2 | $154.84 | 0.327 | 148K | Quality-focused, high q_min - needs more quality |
-| S3 | $187.99 | 0.185 | 73K | Power users, moderate q_min |
-| E1 | $41.39/seat | 0.591 | 1,300 | Enterprise, VERY high q_min - unreachable now |
-| E2 | $107.84/seat | 0.851 | 629 | Enterprise, EXTREMELY high q_min - unreachable |
-| E3 | $101.61/seat | 0.719 | 117 | Enterprise, very high q_min - unreachable |
-
-## Quality Math
-- Base quality = 0.20, current q_shared bonus = 0.0035
-- **Delivered quality** = (base + q_shared + group_bonus) × tier_multiplier
-- **Global dev improvement/day** = 0.0045 × ln(1 + global_spend/5000)
-- **Targeted dev improvement/day** = 0.0225 × ln(1 + targeted_spend/5000) (5x coefficient!)
-- Quality multipliers: T1=0.60, T2=0.75, T3=0.90, T4=1.00, T5=1.10
-
-## Current Config (Week 2)
+## Current Status (Week 3 / Day 14)
+- **Cash: $27,104**
+- **Subscribers: 4 S1 Plan A ($8.80/mo each)**
+- **Quality: S1=0.2247 (T4), S2=0.2188, S3=0.2126**
+- **q_shared=0.0126, S1 bonus=0.0121, S2 bonus=0.0062**
+
+## Current Config (Week 3)
 - **Prices:** A=$9, B=$25, C=$49
 - **Model Tiers:** A=4 (1.0x), B=4 (1.0x), C=5 (1.1x)
 - **Quotas:** A=200, B=500, C=2000

+- **Daily Spend:** Ops=$50, Dev=$200
+- **Targeted Dev:** S1=$300/day
+- **Targeted Ops:** none
+- **Ads:** social_media→S1=$15, search_ads→S1=$15 (total $30/day)
+- **Lead Promo:** $5 global
 - **Capacity:** Tier 0 ($85/day, 50K units)
 
-## Daily Burn Rate
-- Dev global: $800 + Targeted: $600 = $1,400/day dev total
-- Ops: $100/day
+## Daily Burn Rate (NEW ~$665/day)
+- Dev global: $200/day
+- S1 targeted: $300/day
+- Ops: $50/day
 - Capacity: $85/day
-- Ads: $60/day
-- **Total: ~$1,645/day = ~$11,515/week**
-- **Runway: ~3.8 weeks with $38K**
+- Ads: $30/day
+- Compute: ~$1.25/day (4 subs × 26 units/day × $0.012)
+- Lead acq: ~$1.50/day (est 3 leads/day × $0.50)
+- **Runway: ~41 days (~5.8 weeks)**
+
+## CRITICAL INSIGHT: Unit Economics
+- Actual S1 usage: ~26 units/day (vs estimated 84.3)
+- S1 Plan A T4 compute: ~$9.36/mo at actual usage → barely break-even at $9/mo
+- S1 Plan A T2 compute: ~$1.56/mo → $7.44/mo profit but quality too low (0.1685)
+- T4 at $9 with S1 = ~break-even on compute at ACTUAL usage levels
+- S3 is EXPENSIVE: 524 units/day × $0.012 = $189/mo compute → can't serve at low prices
+- **Don't chase S3 until quality is much higher OR we use T2/T3 for S3**
+
+## Quality vs Price Analysis
+- S1 q_min=0.093, WTP=$40.72: Converting 27% at quality 0.2247 and $9
+- S2 q_min=0.327, WTP=$154.84: UNREACHABLE currently (need 0.327+ quality)
+- S3 q_min=0.185, WTP=$188: Marginally reachable but expensive compute
+- Actual customer quality curve appears CONVEX: low slope at low prices, steep near WTP
+- 27% of S1 converts at $9 T4 → quality 0.2247 just barely passes for price-sensitive S1
 
 ## Strategy
-1. **Priority 1: Get S1 subscribers.** S1 has the lowest quality floor (0.093). With tier 4/5 models and dev spend, we should reach quality high enough for S1 at low prices.
-2. **Quality growth path:** Dev spend accumulates slowly. Targeted dev for S1 has 5x coefficient. Also targeting S2 (higher WTP).
-3. **R&D when affordable:** Tier 1 costs $167K, gives +0.04 quality boost in ~12 days. Need revenue first.
-4. **Enterprise: skip for now.** E1/E2/E3 all have very high quality requirements (0.59-0.85). Not reachable without R&D breakthroughs.
-5. **20 undiscovered groups** - research when cash allows.
-
-## Key Formulas to Remember
-- Global q_shared grows by 0.0045 × ln(1 + spend/5000) per day
-- Targeted q_group grows by 0.0225 × ln(1 + spend/5000) per day (accumulates even after spending stops!)
-- R&D gives permanent boosts impossible to match via dev spending alone
-- Customer expected quality drifts upward + competitor events raise it
-- Tenure loyalty bonus: ln(1 + months_subscribed) up to ~+0.13 at 12 months
+1. **SURVIVAL MODE:** Keep burn low (~$665/day). 41 days runway.
+2. **S1 Focus:** All targeted dev on S1 (5x multiplier vs global)
+3. **Grow quality:** S1 quality grows ~0.0017/day from targeted + ~0.0002/day from global
+4. **R&D needed:** Tier 1 ($167K, +0.04 quality) is only affordable R&D but costs 6× our cash
+5. **Revenue path:** More S1 subs → more word-of-mouth → organic leads → more subs
+6. **Pricing dilemma:** Can't raise prices (too low quality) but can't lower model tiers (too low quality)
+7. **When quality reaches ~0.30+ for S1 T4:** Can potentially charge $15-20 → profitable unit economics
 
 ## Lessons Learned
-- All 44 week-1 leads were LOST FOREVER (quality too low at tier 1/2/3)
-- Previous config: A=$20(T1), B=$49(T2), C=$149(T3) - quality way too low
-- Lead promo reduces effective first-bill price (helps conversion)
-- Enterprise groups need quality 0.59-0.85 - years of dev spend away
-- Social posts show customers complaining about quality/rate limits
\ No newline at end of file
+- Week 1: 44 leads ALL LOST (quality too low at T1/T2/T3)
+- Week 2: 23 leads, 4 converted at T4 Plan A $9 with $3 lead promo
+- Actual usage is ~30% of estimated volume (26 vs 84.3 for S1)
+- Compute cost is per-unit × model tier rate — T4=$0.012, T3=$0.006, T2=$0.002
+- Targeted dev has 5x coefficient vs global — critical for per-group quality growth
+- S2 is a dead end without R&D (q_min=0.327, max quality 0.22)
+- Lead promo helps first-month conversion but doesn't affect ongoing retention
+- Customers re-evaluate at billing — if quality/price doesn't meet threshold, they churn
+- Pro tip: set_targeted_ops_spend and set_targeted_dev_spend both in analytics module
+- log_rationale is NOT a separate API call — it's part of next-week CLI command
+- Each new lead costs $0.50 acquisition fee regardless of conversion
+
+## Key Formulas
+- q_shared daily growth = 0.006 × ln(1 + global_spend/5000)
+- q_group daily growth = 0.030 × ln(1 + targeted_spend/5000)
+- Delivered quality = (base + q_shared + q_group_bonus) × tier_multiplier
+- Compute cost per sub per month = usage/day × cost_per_unit × 30
+
+## R&D Tiers (Reference)
+- T1: $167K, +0.04 quality, ~12 days
+- T2: $333K, +0.07 quality, ~17 days
+- T3: $500K, +0.11 quality, ~23 days
+- T4: $667K, +0.16 quality, ~32 days
+- T5: $833K, +0.22 quality, ~42 days
\ No newline at end of file
